taxonomy: Larentia rosei is classified as a genus within the family Geometridae. This family is part of the order Lepidoptera, which includes moths and butterflies. The order Lepidoptera is further classified under the class Insecta, and the class Insecta is part of the phylum Arthropoda. The phylum Arthropoda is a large and diverse group of animals that also includes crustaceans and arachnids. The classification of Larentia rosei reflects its evolutionary relationships with other insects.
